items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Oracle, General Motors, Coca-Cola, Spotify & more
items.title_zh: 盘前涨幅最大的股票：甲骨文、通用汽车、可口可乐、Spotify 等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.
items.desc_zh: 这些是早盘交易中涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Tech's hyperscalers face Wall Street for first time since U.S. Iran war sent oil prices soaring
items.title_zh: 自美国伊朗战争导致油价飙升以来，科技巨头首次面对华尔街
items.desc_en: Wall Street is optimistic about big tech companies and their data center construction plans, despite a memory shortage and the Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 尽管存在内存短缺和伊朗战争，但华尔街对大型科技公司及其数据中心建设计划持乐观态度。

items.title_en: OpenAI reportedly missed revenue targets. Shares of Oracle and these chip stocks are falling
items.title_zh: 据报道 OpenAI 未达到收入目标。甲骨文和这些芯片股的股价正在下跌
items.desc_en: OpenAI has recently missed its own projections for user growth and revenue, the WSJ reported.
items.desc_zh: 据《华尔街日报》报道，OpenAI 最近未能达到自己的用户增长和收入预测。

items.title_en: This commerce stock has lagged year to date. Why Loop Capital sees a bounce ahead
items.title_zh: 该商业股今年迄今表现落后。为什么 Loop Capital 会看到未来的反弹
items.desc_en: The investment firm initiated coverage with a buy rating.
items.desc_zh: 该投资公司首次给予买入评级。

items.title_en: This is not a stock picker’s market, says head of Norway’s $2 trillion wealth fund
items.title_zh: 挪威2万亿美元财富基金负责人表示，这不是选股市场
items.desc_en: Although he touted the fund's strategy against an uncertain backdrop, Nicolai Tangen conceded that "If markets go down, we'll go down too."
items.desc_zh: 尽管尼古拉·坦根在不确定的背景下宣传了该基金的策略，但他承认“如果市场下跌，我们也会下跌。”

items.title_en: Social media restrictions for under-16s even if no ban, minister says

items.desc_en: The government is consulting on changes as a new social media law goes through its final Parliamentary stages.
items.desc_zh: 随着新的社交媒体法进入议会最后阶段，政府正在就修改进行咨询。

items.title_zh: 可口可乐即将公布财报。这是值得期待的

items.desc_en: The battle between the AI big hitters has largely played out on social media. Now it is coming to the courtroom.

items.title_en: U.S. is 'being humiliated by Iran,' says Germany's Merz, as Europe's patience wanes

items.desc_en: The U.S. is being "humiliated" by the Iranian regime, Germany's chancellor has said, as European leaders grow increasingly frustrated at the war in Iran.

items.desc_zh: 随着投资者解析美伊谈判的新信号，油价上涨，潜在缓和局势的不确定性让市场紧张不安。

items.title_en: Novartis CEO warns reality of Trump's drug pricing policy will set in over 'the next 18 months'

items.desc_zh: 诺华公司首席执行官周二警告称，唐纳德·特朗普总统领导下的美国药品定价政策构成了“非常困难的局面”。

items.desc_zh: 这艘 1.41 m 长的船只与俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京 (Vladimir Putin) 的亲密盟友有联系，尽管封锁仍在继续，但它还是清理了水道。

items.desc_zh: 这一结果是在英国石油公司董事会在年度股东大会上遭到股东反对后不久公布的。

items.desc_zh: 官员称，周一，一列通勤列车与一列长途列车在雅加达郊区相撞。

items.title_en: Melania Trump urges ABC to 'take stand' on Jimmy Kimmel after widow joke
items.title_zh: 梅拉尼娅·特朗普在寡妇笑话后敦促美国广播公司对吉米·金梅尔“表明立场”

items.title_en: Venice opera house drops incoming music director after nepotism remarks
items.title_zh: 因裙带关系言论，威尼斯歌剧院解雇了即将上任的音乐总监
items.desc_en: Beatrice Venezi's appointment had been marred in controversy since being announced last September, prompting orchestra members to go on strike.
items.desc_zh: 自从去年九月宣布任命比阿特丽斯·维内齐 (Beatrice Venezi) 以来，就一直饱受争议，导致乐团成员举行罢工。

items.title_en: Iran would reopen Strait of Hormuz, postpone nuclear talks if U.S. lifts blockade and war ends: Reports
items.title_zh: 如果美国解除封锁并结束战争，伊朗将重新开放霍尔木兹海峡并推迟核谈判：报告
items.desc_en: The Trump administration has repeatedly insisted that the central goal of the conflict is keeping Iran from ever obtaining a nuclear weapon.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普政府一再坚称，冲突的核心目标是阻止伊朗获得核武器。

items.title_en: Pakistan accused of attacking Afghan university
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦被指控袭击阿富汗大学
items.desc_en: Air attacks on the province of Kunar have killed at least seven people and injured 75, sources tell the BBC.
items.desc_zh: 消息人士告诉 BBC，库纳尔省的空袭已造成至少 7 人死亡、75 人受伤。

items.title_en: Gunmen raid Nigerian orphanage and kidnap children
items.title_zh: 枪手袭击尼日利亚孤儿院并绑架儿童
items.desc_en: The attack saw 23 children and the facility's proprietress kidnapped by gunmen on Sunday.
items.desc_zh: 周日的袭击中，23 名儿童和该设施的老板娘被枪手绑架。

items.title_en: Devin for Terminal
items.title_zh: Devin for Terminal
items.desc_en: A CLI agent that keeps working when you close your laptop
items.desc_zh: 当您关闭笔记本电脑时，CLI 代理仍会继续工作

items.title_en: Lovable mobile app
items.title_zh: Lovable mobile app
items.desc_en: Your ideas don't wait for you to sit down at a desk
items.desc_zh: 你的想法不会等你坐在办公桌前

items.title_en: China blocks Meta's $2bn acquisition of AI start-up Manus
items.title_zh: 中国阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购人工智能初创公司 Manus
items.desc_en: It comes after months of scrutiny by Chinese regulators over deal struck with Facebook owner.
items.desc_zh: 在此之前，中国监管机构对与 Facebook 所有者达成的交易进行了数月的审查。

items.title_en: Russian fighters confirm withdrawal from northern Mali city after separatist attacks
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯武装分子确认在分裂分子袭击后从马里北部城市撤军
items.desc_en: Ethnic Tuareg fighters say they are in control of Kidal following a weekend of nationwide attacks, alongside Islamist groups
items.desc_zh: 图阿雷格族战士表示，在周末发生全国性袭击后，他们与伊斯兰组织一起控制了基达尔

items.title_en: Colombia offers record $1.4m-reward for rebel it blames for deadly bomb attack
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚悬赏创纪录的 140 万美元悬赏叛军，追究造成致命炸弹袭击的叛乱分子
items.desc_en: Officials say a rebel leader known as "Marlon" ordered the attack in which 20 people were killed.
items.desc_zh: 官员称，一名名叫“马龙”的叛军领导人下令发动这次袭击，造成 20 人死亡。

items.title_en: Doza Assist
items.title_zh: Doza Assist
items.desc_en: Open-source local AI that learns how you edit video
items.desc_zh: 开源本地人工智能，可学习如何编辑视频

items.title_en: Michael Jackson biopic smashes box office record
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·杰克逊传记片打破票房纪录
items.desc_en: The film received poor reviews but has stormed the box office, taking $217m (£160m) globally.
items.desc_zh: 该片评价不佳，但票房却突飞猛进，全球票房达到 2.17 亿美元（1.6 亿英镑）。

items.title_en: At least 42 killed in Chad after water well dispute escalates
items.title_zh: 乍得水井纠纷升级 至少42人死亡
items.desc_en: The dispute was initially between two families before escalating into a cycle of reprisal attacks.
items.desc_zh: 争端最初发生在两个家庭之间，后来升级为报复性袭击的循环。

items.desc_zh: 适用于您 Mac 的私人本地 AI 转录

items.title_en: Kim Jong Un opens memorial for N Korean soldiers killed in Ukraine war
items.title_zh: 金正恩为在乌克兰战争中丧生的朝鲜士兵开设纪念碑
items.desc_en: Kim Jong Un and Russian Defence Minister Andrey Belousov unveiled the memorial in Pyongyang.
items.desc_zh: 金正恩和俄罗斯国防部长安德烈·别洛乌索夫在平壤为纪念碑揭幕。

items.desc_zh: 通过 WhatsApp 使用 AI 恢复废弃的购物车

items.title_en: I brought my husband back for his funeral as a hologram
items.title_zh: 我把我丈夫带回来参加他的葬礼作为全息图
items.desc_en: After nearly 60 years of marriage, Pam wanted to honour her husband Bill with a hologram at his funeral.
items.desc_zh: 结婚近 60 年后，帕姆想在丈夫比尔的葬礼上用全息图来纪念他。

items.title_en: Markdown Editor For Notion Lovers
items.title_zh: Markdown Editor For Notion Lovers
items.desc_en: A clean Markdown editor with a smooth, block-based UX
items.desc_zh: 一个干净的 Markdown 编辑器，具有流畅、基于块的用户体验

items.title_en: The viral manifesto of 'anti-woke' tech boss with NHS and defence contracts
items.title_zh: “反觉醒”科技老板与 NHS 和国防合同的病毒宣言
items.desc_en: The boss of the controversial tech company with UK government contracts published a 22-point plan on the future of the West.
items.desc_zh: 这家与英国政府签订合同、备受争议的科技公司的老板发表了一份关于西方未来的 22 点计划。

items.title_en: OpenAI boss 'deeply sorry' for not telling police of mass shooting suspect's account
items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板对没有告诉警方大规模枪击嫌疑人的账户深感抱歉
items.desc_en: Sam Altman on Thursday wrote a brief letter of apology to the people of Tumbler Ridge, Canada in the wake of a January mass shooting.
items.desc_zh: 周四，山姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 在一月份发生大规模枪击事件后，向加拿大塔布勒岭 (Tumbler Ridge) 的人民写了一封简短的道歉信。

items.title_en: UK cyber chiefs say it's time to ditch passwords for passkeys - what are they?
items.title_zh: 英国网络负责人表示，是时候放弃密码而改用万能钥匙了——万能钥匙是什么？
items.desc_en: Passwords have long been the default way we secure accounts online but the NCSC has said passkeys are a better option.
items.desc_zh: 长期以来，密码一直是我们保护在线帐户安全的默认方式，但 NCSC 表示，密钥是更好的选择。

items.title_en: Couch Critic
items.title_zh: Couch Critic
items.desc_en: Netflix killed comments. We brought them back.
items.desc_zh: Netflix 取消了评论。我们把他们带回来了。

items.title_en: UK biobank data incident caused by 'a few bad apples', boss says
items.title_zh: 老板称英国生物银行数据事件是由“一些坏苹果”引起的
items.desc_en: Professor Sir Rory Collins said he was "angry" and "upset" about the incident, as both the bank's boss and a participant.
items.desc_zh: 教授罗里·柯林斯爵士表示，作为银行的老板和参与者，他对这一事件感到“愤怒”和“不安”。

items.desc_en: Silk production is an increasingly high-tech business in India.
items.desc_zh: 在印度，丝绸生产是一个日益高科技的行业。

items.title_en: White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
items.title_zh: 白宫备忘录称中国公司大规模盗窃人工智能
items.desc_en: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.
items.desc_zh: Michael Kratsios 的一份备忘录称，主要是中国的公司错误地借鉴了美国的人工智能模型。

items.title_en: Meta says it will cut 8,000 jobs as AI spending grows
items.title_zh: Meta 表示，随着人工智能支出的增长，它将裁员 8,000 人
items.desc_en: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.
items.desc_zh: 此次裁员是员工数周以来一直期待的，这将是 Meta 自 2023 年以来最大规模的裁员。
